title: Onboarding screens - Login button without wifi [New]
scenario: User on 'Poly Studio' onboarding screen taps Login after turning off WiFi, triggering a 'Something is wrong' error instead of a graceful no-network handling.
steps: Navigate to the 'Poly Studio' screen during onboarding.
expected: The app should handle the no-network state gracefully (e.g., show a network error message or prompt to reconnect).
